tools.description: Wireless network and device detector, sniffer, wardriving tool, and WIDS framework supporting Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, BLE and other protocols.
Complete suite of tools to assess WiFi network security, including airodump-ng, airmon-ng, aireplay-ng, and aircrack-ng for WEP/WPA cracking.
Python-based interactive packet manipulation program and library that can forge, decode, send and capture packets including 802.11 frames.
Rogue access point framework that performs automated phishing-style attacks against Wi-Fi networks to capture credentials.
Swiss Army knife for 802.11, BLE, IPv4 and IPv6 network reconnaissance and MITM attacks, written in Go.
A2C-based deep reinforcement learning agent instrumenting bettercap to capture WPA/WPA2 handshakes and PMKIDs from surrounding Wi-Fi.
Security auditing and social-engineering tool that retrieves WPA/WPA2 keys via an evil-twin captive-portal attack.
Small WLAN packet capture tool that runs layer-2 attacks to test WPA implementations and discover weak points.
Set of tools to convert captured Wi-Fi packets into hash files for Hashcat or John the Ripper offline cracking.
Community fork of Reaver that performs brute-force attacks against WPS registrar PINs to recover WPA/WPA2 passphrases.
Offline Wi-Fi Protected Setup brute-force utility that recovers WPS PINs from exchanged weak nonces.
C implementation of a WPS brute-force attack with fewer dependencies and improved performance over the original reaver code.
Multi-use bash script for Linux that audits wireless networks with WPS, WPA/WPA2 handshake, PMKID, and evil-twin attacks.
Powerful Python 3 framework for rogue access point attacks, MITM, captive portals, and WiFi network scanning.
Actively maintained rewrite of the popular Wifite wireless auditor, automating WPS, WPA, PMKID, WEP and evil-twin attacks.
Original rewrite of the Wifite wireless auditing script that automates aircrack-ng, reaver, bully and other wifi tools.
Toolkit for targeted evil-twin attacks against WPA2-Enterprise networks with hostile portal indirect wireless pivots.
Affordable ESP8266-based WiFi hacking platform for testing and learning 802.11 scanning, deauth and beacon flooding.
Python script that continuously jams all WiFi clients and access points within range by sending deauthentication frames.
Proof-of-concept tool to exploit common IEEE 802.11 protocol weaknesses via beacon flooding, deauth and packet fuzzing.
World's foremost network protocol analyzer with deep Wi-Fi (802.11) capture and dissection support via libpcap/npcap.
Community-contributed bettercap caplet scripts and proxy modules for automating Wi-Fi reconnaissance and attacks.
Community-maintained active fork of Pwnagotchi with updated plugins, dependencies and modern hardware support.
Mirror and query tool for the WiGLE wireless geolocation database used for WiFi network mapping and wardriving recon.
